chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl.B.A.No. S – 919 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For Hearing of Bail Application. - 01.04-2024. Mr.Abdul Sattar Mahesar Advocate alongwith applicants Mst.Sapna and Tanveer Ali. Mr.Sohail Ahmed Maitlo Advocate for complaiannt. Mr.Shafi Muhammad Mahar DPG. - O R D E R. ZULIFQUAR ALI SANGI, J- Applicants Mst.Sapna and Tanveer Ali have sought pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 90/2023 of Police Station, Ahmedpur, District Khairpur, registered under sections 376, 494, PPC. The applicants were granted interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 20.12.2023 and today their bail application has been fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2 Since the facts of the prosecution case have already been mentioned in the bail order as well as in the memo of bail application, therefore there is no need to repeat the same. 3. Learned counsel for the applicants contended that the applicants are innocent and have been falsely implicated in this case by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motive as from the contents of FIR, the ingredients of Sections 376 & 494, PPC are not attracted. 3. Learned counsel for the complainant has not been able to controvert the contention raised by the learned counsel for the applicant; however he has opposed the bail application while learned DPG appearing for the State has conceded for confirmation of interim bail already granted to the applicants. 4. From the contents of FIR the ingredients of Section 376 & 494, PPC are not attracted in the case; hence the applicants have been able to make out a case for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail.

Learned counsel for the complainant has not been able to controvert the contention raised by the learned counsel for the applicant; however he has opposed the bail application while learned DPG appearing for the State has conceded for confirmation of interim bail already granted to the applicants. 4. From the contents of FIR the ingredients of Section 376 & 494, PPC are not attracted in the case; hence the applicants have been able to make out a case for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail. Consequently, this bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants on 20.12.2023 is hereby confirmed on same terms and condition. Cr.B.A.No. S – 919 of 2023 stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Akber.
